hero.text:
At noon I posted the Belgium lean and promised I'd post if the money moved.

It moved — toward the US.

This morning the winning wallets we track were 8-6 Belgium. All afternoon, American money from proven winners has been showing up. It's 9-8 US now.

I bet against my own country at +180, and the sharpest bettors we track have spent the day trying to talk me out of it.

Our board locks at 7:45. If the flip completes, I post it.

So — ride the noon read, or follow the late money?
hero.selfReplyAt25min:
The rest of tonight's board while we wait on the 7:45 lock:

Houston Astros ML +115 — 4 units, our biggest of the night, 6:46
Milwaukee Brewers ML -108 — 4 units, 7:46
Arizona Diamondbacks ML +108 — 2.5 units, 9:41

Spain cashed this afternoon. Live board: nhlsavant.com/?ref=t0706e
